_comment: Playwright MCP server (Microsoft official). Provides browser automation for UI testing — navigate, click, type, screenshot, accessibility snapshots. Used by Tester-QE for end-to-end and visual regression tests. Requires Node.js >= 18.
_preferred_install: Install via the official Claude plugin marketplace — search 'playwright' in Plugins > Discover. This is the recommended method and handles updates automatically.
_manual_setup: If not using the Claude plugin, merge this config into your tool's MCP settings. Requires browsers: run 'npx playwright install chromium' first. Remove --headless for headed/visual debugging.
_browser_install: REQUIRED before first use: run 'npx playwright install chromium' in your terminal. Browsers install to ~/Library/Caches/ms-playwright (macOS) or ~/.cache/ms-playwright (Linux).
